title: dryopteris fragrans f. aquilonaris
intro: Dryopteris fragrans f. aquilonaris, also known as the Northern Fragrant Shield Fern, is a subspecies of the Dryopteris fragrans plant, which is a type of fern native to Japan and other parts of East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris fragrans f. aquilonaris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Dryopteris fragrans f. aquilonaris is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal preparations for their therapeutic properties.
